base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of swim_throw_vertical_variant — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Secondary throw-sprite used when swimming + throwing with only-vertical movement (no horizontal velocity). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Secondary throw-sprite used when swimming + throwing with only-vertical movement (no horizontal velocity); appears immediately after the throw sprite during underwater gameplay
